subcodes.first_line: Remember Me, remember Me, for verily He is the One made manifest from My presence, and I am, in truth, the All-Judging. This doth they testify who are endowed with knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری ذکری انه لهو الظاهر من عندی و انا الحاکم بالحق یشهد بذلک من عنده علم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution
